title: SaaS customers can Accept remote desktop invites
description:
SaaS workspace owners (like CAT MEOW) were treated as support admins because they have portal permissions. That hid the Accept/Decline buttons on remote desktop invites and only showed the status text. Remote invites now use chat participant role (customer vs support admin), so SaaS customers always get Accept/Decline in the chat message list.

Who is affected: SaaS tenant customers receiving remote desktop help from BASE support.
changeLog: SaaS portalPermissionsAccess no longer marks users as support admins.
Remote invite Accept/Decline shown to the chat customer/invitee.
Invite attachment includes customerUserId for reliable invitee detection.
